'''nofataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wqo|wqo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wqo|wqo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nofataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofatithi|nofatithi]] || [[word:nofatiji|nofatiji]] || [[word:nofatishi|nofatishi]] || [[word:nofatiki|nofatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofatuthuthu|nofatuthuthu]] || [[word:nofatujuju|nofatujuju]] || [[word:nofatushushu|nofatushushu]] || [[word:nofatukuku|nofatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofatuthu|nofatuthu]] || [[word:nofatuju|nofatuju]] || [[word:nofatushu|nofatushu]] || [[word:nofatuku|nofatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofatufthuf|nofatufthuf]] || [[word:nofatufjuf|nofatufjuf]] || [[word:nofatufshuf|nofatufshuf]] || [[word:nofatufkuf|nofatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofatethe|nofatethe]] || [[word:nofateje|nofateje]] || [[word:nofateshe|nofateshe]] || [[word:nofateke|nofateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofatothotho|nofatothotho]] || [[word:nofatojojo|nofatojojo]] || [[word:nofatoshosho|nofatoshosho]] || [[word:nofatokoko|nofatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofatotho|nofatotho]] || [[word:nofatojo|nofatojo]] || [[word:nofatosho|nofatosho]] || [[word:nofatoko|nofatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofatofthof|nofatofthof]] || [[word:nofatofjof|nofatofjof]] || [[word:nofatofshof|nofatofshof]] || [[word:nofatofkof|nofatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfthĂŻf|nofatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfjĂŻf|nofatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfshĂŻf|nofatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfkĂŻf|nofatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nofatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nofatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nofatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nofatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfthĂŻf|nofatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfjĂŻf|nofatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfshĂŻf|nofatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfkĂŻf|nofatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfthĂŻf|nofatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfjĂŻf|nofatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfshĂŻf|nofatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nofatĂŻfkĂŻf|nofatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofatĂŠthĂŠ|nofatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nofatĂŠjĂŠ|nofatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nofatĂŠshĂŠ|nofatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nofatĂŠkĂŠ|nofatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofatathatha|nofatathatha]] || [[word:nofatajaja|nofatajaja]] || [[word:nofatashasha|nofatashasha]] || [[word:nofatakaka|nofatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofatatha|nofatatha]] || [[word:nofataja|nofataja]] || [[word:nofatasha|nofatasha]] || [[word:nofataka|nofataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofatafthaf|nofatafthaf]] || [[word:nofatafjaf|nofatafjaf]] || [[word:nofatafshaf|nofatafshaf]] || [[word:nofatafkaf|nofatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nofatasha|nofatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofatshĂ«sha|nofatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofatrosha|nofatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofatmusha|nofatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofatyasha|nofatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofatnkshĂ«sha|gonofatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofatnkrosha|gonofatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofatnkmusha|gonofatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofatnkyasha|gonofatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nofafatasha|nofafatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofafatshĂ«sha|nofafatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofafatrosha|nofafatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofafatmusha|nofafatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofafatyasha|nofafatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofafatnkshĂ«sha|gonofafatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofafatnkrosha|gonofafatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofafatnkmusha|gonofafatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofafatnkyasha|gonofafatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nefĂŠtasha|nefĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nefĂŠtshĂ«sha|nefĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nefĂŠtrosha|nefĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nefĂŠtmusha|nefĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nefĂŠtyasha|nefĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonefĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gonefĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonefĂŠtnkrosha|gonefĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonefĂŠtnkmusha|gonefĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonefĂŠtnkyasha|gonefĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nofatasha|nofatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofatshĂ«sha|nofatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofatrosha|nofatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofatmusha|nofatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofatyasha|nofatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofatnkshĂ«sha|gonofatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofatnkrosha|gonofatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofatnkmusha|gonofatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofatnkyasha|gonofatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
